name: Parsa
text: As an international student far from home, Global Friends has been one of the most welcoming communities I've experienced in the U.S. It helped me build real friendships, feel connected, and find support during a challenging transition.

name: Student
text: Global Friends helped me connect with American culture while also making meaningful friendships and professional connections. It made my experience feel more welcoming and less isolating.

name: Sushruth Murakare
text: Global Friends has been invaluable to me as an international student. Moving to a new country without any connections was daunting, but they provided everything from moving help and grocery rides to safe transportation for events. In a place where everything is unfamiliar, having this community made all the difference. During lonely or challenging times, their events and connections helped me feel supported and less alone. They've done so much for me that I don't even know how I could ever repay their kindness. They're doing remarkable work for international students, and I'm deeply grateful.

name: Student
text: Global Friends has been a wonderful community for me, and I've truly enjoyed being part of it. It's much more than just a group — through Global Friends, I've learned a lot about American culture and traditions, while also connecting with people from many different countries. I really enjoyed the holiday events like Christmas and Thanksgiving, which made me feel included. Tea and Talk sessions are also a highlight, offering a relaxed space to share ideas and have meaningful conversations on a variety of topics. The organizers are incredibly kind and supportive, and from the very beginning I felt welcomed. Overall, I highly recommend Global Friends to anyone looking for connection, friendship, and cultural exchange.
